title: trisetum cristatum
intro: Trisetum cristatum, also known as Crested Wheatgrass, is a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe, Asia, and North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Trisetum cristatum include its ability to promote digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. Trisetum cristatum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
